# AI Coding Agent Instructions

## where to run the codes
run all the codes in the pytorch-cpu env.

Run this to activate.
```
conda activate pytorch-cpu
```
DO NOT run any cmd in `base` env. Don't create new env.


## Execution plan

Always design an execution plan and then follow that plan.
Always store those execution plans in a directory called execution plan.


## Code generation guideline

Always put generated code in the `kcc_codebase` folder. Don't tamper with the code present in the `code` dir.

## File naming convention

follow flake8 guidelines. Use snake_case for file names. This applies to all files, including scripts, modules, and data files.
